name: Betaab Valley
description: A breathtaking valley surrounded by lush green meadows, snow-clad mountains, and dense pine and deodar forests, with the crystal-clear Lidder River flowing through it.
history: Originally called Hajan Valley, it was renamed 'Betaab' after the hit 1983 Bollywood movie of the same name was shot here.
famousFor: Lush meadows, Bollywood filming location, Lidder river.
